sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87079" key="prodomeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδομ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n87079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who builds before,</tr_> epith. of certain gods, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:42:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.42.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
